about.title: About Us
about.intro: {{brand}} is a browser-based image editing tool. All processing happens locally in your browser — your images are never uploaded to any server. We believe great image tools shouldn't sacrifice your privacy.

features.adjust: Basic Adjustments — Brightness, contrast, saturation sliders with live preview
features.filter: Preset Filters — B&W, vintage, warm, cool, vivid, faded, sharpen, blur and more (8 styles)
features.crop: Smart Crop — Free crop + 6 aspect ratios (1:1, 4:3, 3:4, 16:9, 9:16, 3:2) with rotation and rule-of-thirds
features.smartCutout: AI Smart Cutout — IS-Net model auto-detects subject, WebGPU accelerated, morphological edge refinement
features.brushCutout: Brush Cutout — AI-assisted with manual brush correction, green keep / red erase, portrait-grade precision
features.idphoto: ID Photo — AI cutout + smart crop + red/white/blue background, 1-inch / 2-inch / small 2-inch + 6-inch print layout
features.compress: Image Compression — Quality slider + size constraint + file size estimate, WebP / JPEG
features.convert: Format Conversion — PNG / JPEG / WebP / AVIF interconversion
features.watermark: Custom Watermark — Text or image watermark, 8 positions
features.export: Multi-format Export — PNG / JPEG / WebP / AVIF with quality and size control

tech.local: All image processing in-browser — zero upload, zero storage
tech.ai: AI inference via ONNX Runtime + WebGPU — no backend compute needed
tech.edge: Edge refinement: morphological operations + Gaussian feathering + contrast sharpening
tech.shortcuts: Full keyboard shortcut support for efficient workflow
tech.bg: Daily refreshed background image — edit in a good mood

useCases.daily: Quick photo adjustments and filter styling
useCases.ecommerce: E-commerce product background removal and compression
useCases.idphoto: Self-service ID and visa photo generation
useCases.social: Social media avatar creation and watermarking
useCases.batch: Batch image format conversion and size reduction

about.cta: No registration, no installation, just open and use. Your images stay on your device.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.summary: In short: your images never leave your device.
privacy.s1Body: {{brand}} is a purely front-end application. All image editing, AI cutout, and ID photo operations run locally in your browser. We do not collect, store, or upload any of your image data.
privacy.s2Body: The AI cutout feature uses ONNX Runtime for local inference on your device. Model files are downloaded from a CDN on first use and cached. The inference runs entirely in your browser — no image data is sent to any remote server.
privacy.s3Body: The app uses your browser's localStorage to store preferences (such as theme mode). This data stays on your device and is never synced to the cloud.
privacy.s4Body: This site may use the following third-party services:
privacy.s4Ads: Google AdSense / Baidu Ads — for displaying ads, advertisers may use cookies for relevant ads
privacy.s4Fonts: Google Fonts — for loading web fonts
privacy.s4Cdn: CDN — for distributing AI model files and static assets
privacy.s4Cookie: You can clear cookies in your browser settings to opt out of ad personalization.
privacy.s5Body: Exported image files are fully under your control, saved to your chosen local path. We have no access to exported files.
privacy.s6Body: This privacy policy may be updated from time to time. Updated policies will be posted on this page. Continued use constitutes agreement with the updated policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: If you encounter issues or have feature suggestions, feel free to reach us:
contact.feedbackBody: Found a bug or have a suggestion? Please describe the issue in detail (browser version, steps, expected vs actual behavior) and we'll address it promptly.
contact.faq1A: The first use downloads the AI model (~24MB), which is cached afterwards. WebGPU-enabled browsers (like Chrome) are significantly faster.
contact.faq2Q: ID photo face position is inaccurate?
contact.faq2A: We recommend uploading a formal photo with clear facial features and even lighting. AI cutout quality depends on the contrast between the subject and background.
contact.faq3A: Latest Chrome / Edge / Firefox are recommended. Some features may be limited in Safari.
contact.footer: For more questions, feel free to contact us via email.

seed1.title: How to Take Photos Perfect for ID Documents
seed1.excerpt: ID photos are a common headache. This article covers lighting, angles, facial expressions, and attire—teaching you to capture high-quality ID photo originals with your phone, then generate standard ID photos with Zan Pic in one click.

seed2.title: AI Background Removal: How the IS-Net Model Works
seed2.excerpt: Zan Pic's AI cutout is powered by IS-Net (Iterative Spatial Refinement Network). This article explains the model architecture, ONNX inference pipeline, and WebGPU acceleration in an approachable way.

seed3.title: Best Practices for E-Commerce Product Background Removal
seed3.excerpt: Removing backgrounds from product images is a frequent task in e-commerce. Learn how to handle complex edges (plush toys, transparent materials) with the brush tool and batch-process product photos efficiently.

seed4.title: ID Photo Background Color Guide
seed4.excerpt: When should you use red, white, or blue backgrounds? What do different countries require for visa photos? This article summarizes common ID photo specifications and background color standards.

seed5.title: Getting Started with Photo Filters and Color Grading
seed5.excerpt: Brightness, contrast, and saturation are the three pillars of color grading. This article covers the fundamentals and pairs them with Zan Pic's real-time preview to help you master color adjustment quickly.

seed6.title: WebGPU Acceleration: 10x Faster AI Inference in Browsers
seed6.excerpt: WebGPU is the next-generation browser graphics API—not just for rendering, but also for accelerating AI inference. Learn how Zan Pic leverages WebGPU to boost background removal speed several times over.
